Name: Jasper WHM Events
Description: Healing-first White Mage event profile for general PvE. Handles dungeon and duty recovery through events first, while allowing damage through normal ACR priorities when safe.

Events.Name: [01] Temperance
Events.Description: Before AoE/Raidwide and don't have plenary

Events.Name: [02] Divine Caress
Events.Description: Before AoE/Raidwide AND Temperance active

Events.Name: [03] Plenary Indulgence
Events.Description: Before AoE/Raidwide AND don't have divine caress or temperance

Events.Name: [04] Liturgy of the Bell
Events.Description: Party hp average <= 60% HP

Events.Name: [05] Liturgy of the Bell (Pre-Damage)
Events.Description: Before AoE/Raidwide if off cooldown and party avg hp <= 80%

Events.Name: [06] Divine Benison (TB)
Events.Description: Tank before Tankbuster & no aqua on them

Events.Name: [07] Divine Benison (Aggro)
Events.Description: Tank if >= 3 aggro

Events.Name: [08] Divine Benison (AoE)
Events.Description: Self or party member before AoE/Raidwide if HP < 70%

Events.Name: [09] Divine Benison (2 Charges)
Events.Description: Use on tank if in combat and 2 charges are available

Events.Name: [10] Aquaveil (TB)
Events.Description: Tank before Tankbuster and no divine benison on them

Events.Name: [11] Aquaveil (Aggro)
Events.Description: Tank if >= 3 aggro

Events.Name: [12] Asylum
Events.Description: Place center if party average hp <= 80%

Events.Name: [13] Tetragrammaton (MT)
Events.Description: Tank HP < 50% & does not have tank invuln

Events.Name: [14] Tetragrammaton (ST)
Events.Description: Any party member HP < 50%

Events.Name: [15] Benediction
Events.Description: Any target HP < 20% AND target has no invuln buff

Events.Name: [16] Divine Caress (Post-AoE)
Events.Description: After AoE/Raidwide AND Temperance active (applies regen)

Events.Name: [17] Liturgy of the Bell (Pop)
Events.Description: Manually pop if party average below <= 45% hp

Events.Name: [17.5] Afflatus Solace (Overcap) MT
Events.Description: Lily count = 3 AND during downtime/movement (avoid overcap)

Events.Name: [18] Afflatus Rapture (Overcap)
Events.Description: Lily count = 3 AND during downtime/movement (avoid overcap)

Events.Name: [19] Misery -> Afflatus Rapture
Events.Description: Party HP <= 70%

Events.Name: [19] Afflatus Rapture
Events.Description: Party HP <= 70%

Events.Name: [20] Afflatus Solace (Overcap)
Events.Description: Lily count = 3 AND during downtime/movement (avoid overcap)

Events.Name: [21] Misery -> Afflatus Solace (MT)
Events.Description: Tank HP < 60% AND Tetragrammaton on cooldown

Events.Name: [21] Afflatus Solace (MT)
Events.Description: Tank HP < 60% AND Tetragrammaton on cooldown

Events.Name: [22] Misery -> Afflatus Solace (ST)
Events.Description: Any party member HP < 50% AND Tetragrammaton on cooldown

Events.Name: [22] Afflatus Solace (ST)
Events.Description: Any party member HP < 50% AND Tetragrammaton on cooldown

Events.Name: [23] Regen (Downtime)
Events.Description: Tank if no target (during downtime)

Events.Name: [24] Regen
Events.Description: Tank <= 40% HP

Events.Name: [25] Medica III
Events.Description: ONLY if Lily = 0 AND party HP < 70%

Events.Name: [26] Medica III (Pre-Damage)
Events.Description: ONLY if Lily = 0 AND before AoE/Raidwide AND party HP < 80%

Events.Name: [27] Cure III
Events.Description: ONLY if Lily = 0 AND will hit 80% of party AND party HP < 40%

Events.Name: [28] Cure II
Events.Description: ONLY if Lily = 0 AND Tetragrammaton on CD AND Tank HP < 50% AND no mitigation

Events.Name: [29] Medica (Pre-Damage)
Events.Description: ONLY if Lily = 0 AND before AoE/Raidwide AND party HP < 70%

Events.Name: [30] Medica
Events.Description: ONLY if Lily = 0 AND party hp <= 45%

Events.Name: [33] Cure (MT Emergency)
Events.Description: Low-level Cure fallback for the main tank.

Events.Name: [34] Cure (ST Emergency)
Events.Description: Low-level Cure fallback for the lowest HP party member.

Events.Name: [35] Medica (Low Level Emergency)
Events.Description: Low-level Medica fallback for critical party damage.

Events.Name: Esuna
Events.Description: Cleanses removable party debuffs when safe.
